subject: Project Management
title: Digital Kanban Tools
description: A micro-lesson that makes Digital Kanban Tools usable.

hook.text: Trello launched in 2011 with a simple Kanban interface. It gained 50 million users.

buildup.text: Jira, Asana, Monday, and Azure DevOps all offer Kanban boards as a core feature.

discovery.text: Digital boards add analytics: cycle time charts, cumulative flow diagrams, bottleneck alerts.

twist.text: Physical boards have one advantage digital can't match: you can't ignore a wall full of sticky notes.

climax.text: The best teams use both — digital for data, physical for daily visibility.

punchline.text: The tool doesn't matter. The visibility does.

quiz.question: What is one advantage physical Kanban boards have over digital ones?
options: They are impossible to ignore — always visible on the wall
